name: Maya Chen
relevant_history: Saves 5–10 reels a week; has done 2 in the last month. Tried Notion for a 'to-do' list, abandoned it.
in_their_voice: I have a whole folder of places I want to try. I've been to maybe two.

name: Jordan Reyes
relevant_history: TikTok and IG saves in the hundreds. Occasionally shares with friends; rarely executes.
in_their_voice: My saves are a graveyard. I swear I'll go to that exhibit.

name: Alex Kim
relevant_history: Uses Pinterest and IG for inspiration; never revisits systematically.
in_their_voice: I save stuff and forget. Then I feel bad I never did it.

name: Sam Rivera
relevant_history: Tried habit apps; didn't stick. Wants something tied to 'things to do' not tasks.
in_their_voice: I don't need another productivity app. I need to actually do the fun stuff I save.

name: Taylor Brooks
relevant_history: Anxiety about time; avoids committing to plans. Uses calendar for classes only.
in_their_voice: I never know how long things take. I'm scared to commit and then run out of time.

name: Casey Morgan
relevant_history: Strict work schedule; leisure feels 'indulgent.' Needs clear time expectations.
in_their_voice: If I knew it was 90 minutes total I could block it. Without that I just don't.

name: Riley Walsh
relevant_history: Overwhelmed by options; needs 'is this okay to do now' clarity.
in_their_voice: I need to know it's actually doable in the time I have.

name: Jamie Lee
relevant_history: Tried calendar blocking; gave up. Wants something that suggests 'you have 2 hours, here are 3 things.'
in_their_voice: Tell me how long it takes and I can say yes or no. Don't make me guess.

name: Eunice Ochieng
relevant_history: Organizes East African/Kenyan meetups; exhausted by WhatsApp polls and chase.
in_their_voice: I'd want something that makes commitment easier and more visible — not just 'interested' but locking people in.

name: Dev Patel
relevant_history: Always the one making the group chat and following up. Tired of flakiness.
in_their_voice: I didn't sign up to be project manager for my friends' social life.

name: Morgan Tate
relevant_history: Uses When2Meet and group chats; people don't fill things out on time.
in_their_voice: Once it's on a calendar people show up. Without that, plans die.

name: Quinn Hayes
relevant_history: Hard to align with friends; wants less back-and-forth and visible commitment.
in_their_voice: I don't want to chase people. The tool has to enforce accountability without feeling aggressive.

name: Tess Nguyen
relevant_history: 400 TikTok saves, has done maybe three. Doesn't want to research; wants a shortlist.
in_their_voice: I want to do something new, I just don't want to spend an hour figuring out what.

name: Blake Foster
relevant_history: Goes to same bars and restaurants. Open to suggestions if they're easy.
in_their_voice: Surprise me with a few good options. I don't want to scroll through 200.

name: Reese Adams
relevant_history: Saves ideas but rarely acts. Would try an app that surfaces 3–5 things.
in_their_voice: I don't have a research problem. I have a 'actually do it' problem.

name: Drew Collins
relevant_history: Notes app list of restaurants from September; been to one. Wants a nudge.
in_their_voice: Give me a shortlist for this weekend. Don't make me decide from 50 options.

name: Ruby Chen
relevant_history: Avoids social features; wants personal utility. Skeptical of 'algorithm' and data use.
in_their_voice: I don't want another app that feels like a social network. I want something that actually helps me.

name: Avery Stone
relevant_history: Tried social planning apps; left. Wants transparency on how recommendations work.
in_their_voice: If you say 'gets smarter' I need to know what that means. No black boxes.

name: Jordan Blake
relevant_history: Distrusts 'personalized' claims without explanation. Wants control over data.
in_their_voice: Don't use words like 'taste-powered' without explaining how. I need to trust it.

name: Sam Kim
relevant_history: Uses minimal apps; reads privacy policies. Won't sign up without clear value and no fluff.
in_their_voice: Tell me what it does in one sentence. No influencer language.
